message:
fix(scheduler): reset cancel streak to 1 on fallback dispatch for correct fairness bound

When the three-lane worker exhausts ready/timed/steal work and falls
back to dispatching a cancel task beyond the streak limit, reset
cancel_streak to 1 instead of 0. This ensures the next iteration
re-checks for ready/timed work after at most cancel_streak_limit - 1
more cancel dispatches, matching the documented fairness bound rather
than allowing one extra cancel dispatch per cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
